overall.description: A nighttime cinematic walk through the historic Saint Denis district in Red Dead Redemption 2, featuring gas-lit streets, palm-lined parks, and ornate 19th-century architecture. The camera circles the General Harris statue and proceeds through the park past the City Hall building before exiting to the main street.

events.description: camera begins circling left around the General Harris statue

agents.ego_description: slowly circling the statue to observe it from different angles while remaining in the park plaza

entered.detail: large stone monument with bronze equestrian statue of General Quincy T. Harris
tall palm trees lining the park plaza
ornate cast iron gas lamp illuminating the statue area
wooden park bench with metal armrests
circular flower bed with red blooms surrounding the statue base

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the General Harris statue in a palm-lined park plaza at night. The camera circles the monument, revealing gas lamps, park benches, and flower beds while the warm glow of street lighting illuminates the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined park path approaching city hall

events.description: moving from the open plaza into the tree-lined avenue toward the large building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the palm-lined path toward the illuminated historic building

entered.detail: large three-story historic building with stone facade, arched windows, and mansard roof

segments.scene_description: Leaving the statue behind, the camera proceeds down a palm-lined path toward the imposing Saint Denis City Hall. The building's stone facade and arched windows become increasingly prominent as the camera approaches.

events.description: turning right to follow the path around the building corner
pedestrian in suit appears walking toward the camera

agents.ego_description: turning around the building corner and continuing along the side path where a pedestrian passes by

notable_agents.action: man in suit smoking a cigarette walks past the camera on the path

entered.detail: large weeping willow tree with drooping branches illuminated by lamplight
full moon visible in the night sky above the buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right around the City Hall building, revealing a side path lined with willow trees. A pedestrian in a suit passes by smoking a cigarette, and the moon becomes visible in the night sky above the architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with historic shop fronts

events.description: passing the Henry Gossing shop with illuminated signage and wrought iron balcony

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered path beneath the building's wrought iron balcony and shop fronts

entered.detail: two-story historic building with sign reading Henry Gossing and ornate wrought iron balcony
decorative black wrought iron railings on the second floor of the building

segments.scene_description: The path leads along a covered walkway beneath historic shop fronts, including the Henry Gossing building with its ornate wrought iron balconies. Gas lamps cast warm light on the path as the camera moves past the sheltered storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: park exit leading to cobblestone street

events.description: passing through the iron gate from the park to the main street
approaching a wooden cart parked near the street corner

agents.ego_description: exiting the park through the iron gate and stepping onto the cobblestone street

notable_agents.action: man in blue coat and hat standing beside a wooden cart at the park exit

entered.detail: ornate black iron gate marking the exit from the park to the street
wooden two-wheeled cart parked on the street corner
tall cast iron street lamps lining the cobblestone road
row of three-story historic buildings with lit windows across the street

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the park through an ornate iron gate onto a cobblestone street. A man stands beside a wooden cart near the exit, while historic buildings with illuminated windows line the street ahead, marking the transition from the park to the urban streetscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet, gas-lit park plaza that gradually transitions into a bustling urban streetscape. It begins by circling the General Harris statue amidst palm trees and flower beds, where the warm glow of street lamps illuminates the night. As the camera leaves the monument behind, it proceeds down a palm-lined path toward the imposing stone facade and arched windows of the Saint Denis City Hall. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right past willow trees and a smoking pedestrian, moving beneath the ornate wrought iron balconies of historic shop fronts under a moonlit sky. Finally, the path leads through an ornate iron gate and past a man with a wooden cart, exiting the park onto a cobblestone street lined with illuminated buildings.
